faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Learn more about how BaziAI works

items.title: What is BaziAI and how does it work?
items.description: BaziAI is an innovative AI-powered Bazi guidance platform that combines traditional Eastern wisdom with cutting-edge technology. Think of it as your personal advisor available 24/7, offering insights for career decisions, relationship guidance, and life choices. Our platform analyzes your birth information using both ancient Eastern methodologies and advanced AI to provide personalized, actionable advice.

items.title: How does BaziAI generate accurate readings?
items.description: BaziAI creates accurate readings through a unique dual-approach system. When you input your birth information, our sophisticated AI analyzes it using traditional Eastern Bazi principles combined with modern data analysis. This blend of ancient wisdom and technology ensures comprehensive, personalized insights that become more refined over time through continuous learning from user feedback.

items.title: What types of readings does BaziAI offer?
items.description: BaziAI provides a comprehensive range of readings covering all major life aspects: career guidance, love and relationships, wealth opportunities, personality analysis, and health insights. Each reading type is specifically designed to offer deep insights and practical advice for your unique situation, helping you make informed decisions about your future.

items.title: Can I try BaziAI for free?
items.description: Yes! BaziAI offers a free plan that includes 3 readings per day, basic Bazi analysis, essential life guidance, and access to all reading types. This allows you to experience our platform's capabilities and understand how our AI-powered insights can benefit your life decisions before choosing a premium plan.

items.title: What makes BaziAI different from traditional Bazi telling?
items.description: Unlike traditional Bazi telling, BaziAI provides data-driven, actionable insights powered by AI technology. We don't just predict what might happen - we offer clear, practical guidance based on both Eastern wisdom and modern analytical methods. Plus, you can access your readings anytime, track predictions, and receive regular updates as circumstances change.

items.title: How can I get the most out of my BaziAI readings?
items.description: To maximize your BaziAI experience, we recommend starting with specific questions about areas of your life you want to explore. Premium users can ask follow-up questions for deeper insights, track their readings over time, and use our interactive AI chat feature for clarification. Regular readings help you stay aligned with your life's optimal path.

items.title: Is my personal information secure with BaziAI?
items.description: Absolutely. BaziAI takes data privacy seriously and employs industry-standard encryption to protect your personal information. We only use your birth information to generate accurate readings and never share your data with third parties. Your trust and privacy are our top priorities.

items.title: How often should I consult BaziAI?
items.description: While you can access BaziAI 24/7, we recommend regular consultations - perhaps weekly or monthly - to stay aligned with your life's path. Important decisions or life changes are ideal times for additional readings. Premium users have unlimited access and can consult whenever they need guidance.

items.title: Can BaziAI help with specific life decisions?
items.description: Yes! Whether you're considering a career change, exploring relationship possibilities, or making important life choices, BaziAI provides targeted insights and practical guidance. Our AI analyzes your unique circumstances to offer personalized advice that helps you make informed decisions.

items.title: What's included in the Premium plan?
items.description: The Premium plan offers unlimited readings, interactive AI chat capabilities, follow-up questions, and deeper insights across all reading types. Premium users enjoy priority access to new features, comprehensive analysis, and the ability to track their Bazi patterns over time for more informed decision-making.

brand.title: BaziAI
brand.description: Your Bazi analysis platform powered by DeepSeek R1, combining ancient wisdom with cutting-edge AI technology for precise life guidance.

examples.text: Using clear, beginner-friendly language, analyze my life's trajectory and key turning points based on my Bazi chart; identify my personality strengths and weaknesses with auspicious and inauspicious elements, and offer practical methods to boost my fortune.
examples.label: Life Trajectory Analysis

examples.text: Based on both our Bazi charts, reveal where we align and where we may clash in personality, emotions, and career.
examples.label: Dual Relationship Reading

examples.text: What does my Bazi chart indicate about my wealth prospects? Am I destined for easy gains or must I work hard, and when are the best windows to attract money?
examples.label: Wealth Development Analysis

examples.text: According to my Bazi, how will my career evolve over the next five years? When are the optimal times for promotion or switching paths, and which challenges should I watch out for?
examples.label: Career Development Forecast

home1.text: Help me analyze my life in detail, including: 1) The trajectory of my life, turning points, and life strategies 2) My personality strengths and weaknesses 3) My Bazi structure and favorable elements 4) Methods to enhance my fortune. I am a beginner, so please use simple and easy-to-understand language, but also include profound insights.

home2.text: Can you summarize the keyword of my destiny in one sentence?

career1.text: How will my career develop in the next 5 years? What key opportunities and challenges await?

love1.text: How compatible are we according to our birth charts? What are our hidden strengths and potential conflicts as a couple?

wealth1.text: What does my birth chart reveal about my wealth potential? Do I have the destiny to attract wealth or need to work hard for it?

destiny1.text: When are the major life turning points in my destiny? How should I prepare for the changes ahead?

love2.text: Should we take our relationship to the next level? What do our charts reveal about timing and long-term harmony?

wealth2.text: Which periods in the coming years are most favorable for improving my finances or making investments?

love3.text: When am I most likely to meet a meaningful romantic partner? What signs and timing should I look for?

career2.text: Is 2025 a favorable year for job change or professional breakthroughs? Which months offer the best timing?
